name: Heartbeat Two-Section Waiting Display
goal: Split the Slack heartbeat's single WAITING ON YOU block into two always-paired labeled sections (WAITING ON COMMANDER, WAITING ON {operator_name}) with matching per-worker tags, each falling back to 'there is nothing' when empty.

tasks.name: RED - format_heartbeat tests for two-section format
tasks.description: Replace TestHeartbeatWaits in test_notifications.py with assertions for the two-section format, commander scaffold fallback, per-worker tag routing, and operator_name default. Run to confirm failure.

steps.description: Replace TestHeartbeatWaits class (lines 364-392) with new two-section test assertions
Run TestHeartbeatWaits to verify failure
steps.expected: FAIL - TypeError: format_heartbeat() got an unexpected keyword argument 'operator_name'

steps.description: Update any remaining WAITING ON YOU literal elsewhere in the file to WAITING ON Operator
Confirm no remaining WAITING ON YOU literal in the test file
steps.command: cd commander && grep -n "WAITING ON YOU\|waiting on you" tests/test_notifications.py

steps.description: Stage changes

tasks.name: GREEN - implement two-section format_heartbeat
tasks.description: Add operator_name and commander_waits params to format_heartbeat; render two always-paired labeled sections with independent there-is-nothing fallbacks; update per-worker tag dispatch.

steps.description: Replace format_heartbeat function (lines 96-129) with two-section implementation
Run full notifications test file to verify pass
Confirm no remaining WAITING ON YOU literal in source
steps.command: cd commander && grep -n "WAITING ON YOU\|waiting on you" src/ironclaude/notifications.py

steps.description: Stage changes

tasks.name: RED - update test_main_validate.py for new one-time-alert literal
tasks.description: Update the two tests asserting the literal 'Waiting on you' one-time alert text to expect 'Waiting on Operator', and strengthen test_post_heartbeat_passes_waits to assert operator_name pass-through.

steps.description: Update test_awaiting_operator_message_captures_and_alerts assertion (line 424) to expect 'Waiting on Operator'
Update test_alert_deduped_for_same_question filter (line 486) to expect 'Waiting on Operator'
Add operator_name kwarg assertion to test_post_heartbeat_passes_waits
Run TestOperatorWaits to verify failure
steps.expected: FAIL - literal assertions and operator_name kwarg assertion fail

steps.description: Stage changes

tasks.name: GREEN - thread operator_name through main.py callsites
tasks.description: Update _maybe_capture_operator_wait's one-time alert literal and post_heartbeat's format_heartbeat call to read and pass config.get('operator_name', 'Operator').

steps.description: Update _maybe_capture_operator_wait one-time alert (lines 1411-1415) to use operator_name
Update post_heartbeat's format_heartbeat call (lines 2443-2447) to pass operator_name
Run TestOperatorWaits to verify pass
Confirm no remaining literal in main.py
steps.command: cd commander && grep -n "Waiting on you\|waiting on you" src/ironclaude/main.py

steps.description: Run full commander test suite
Stage changes
